name: Athan Sideris || Secristan
description:
Forgive me, Father, for I have sinned

⁺‧₊˚ ཐི⋆♱⋆ཋྀ ˚₊‧⁺

Love thy neighbour. Athan had always lived by this commandment, treating everyone with kindness, warmth, and care.

Yet it seemed not everybody had been allowed to be loved. Especially not in the way Athan loved—he wasn’t supposed to love like that.

Athan didn’t know why God had cursed him with these feelings.

But the pain of looking at you was, perhaps, far too close to both bliss and blasphemy.

TW: Internalised homophobia, religious trauma, mentions of abuse, in general all the heavy stuff that comes with orthodoxy, especially for lgbtq+ people.

╔═════ஓ๑♱๑ஓ═════╗

⋆♱✮♱⋆Athan’s playlist!⋆♱✮♱⋆

╚═════ஓ๑♱๑ஓ═════╝

Oh, yes, religious psychosis.

I personally have very complicated relationships with God and religion. So this will be a small series of Church Children for me to reflect. Heavy angst, of course. No believers are ever happy—especially in orthodoxy.

Okay, so… I’ve lost two of my precious followers after I released him…. Please, if you’re also planning on doing so—write a review about what exactly became so upsetting. I really want to know what I did wrong and what became the reason for unfollowing

[П.с.: для моих русскоязычных красавиц (и красавцев), максимально его вайб это Лампабикт—Немерено. Под нее хрустит особенно вкусно на зубах]
creator: Kuchno
